scripts.deps:graph: depcruise src --config .dependency-cruiser.mjs --output-type json | bun scripts/generate-deps-md.ts && oxfmt docs/DEPS.md 'src/*/DEPS.md'
scripts.validate: bun run fmt:check && bun run lint && bun run check
scripts.container:build:all: bun run container:build && bun run container:build:base
scripts.deploy: podman-compose up -d && echo 'Deployed: nr deploy:logs to follow logs'
scripts.deploy:rebuild-base: bun run container:build:base && podman-compose down && podman volume rm -f vicissitude_bot-node-modules vicissitude_bot-dist; podman-compose up -d && echo 'Base rebuilt and deployed: nr deploy:logs to follow logs'
